name: tab-intros
note: Operator UAT 2026-07-18, three asks in one design: (1) 'library on first load may not be obvious purpose/next step' + 'setlist is the only tab with a heading' -> EVERY tab now opens with one orienting purpose sentence (the .tabIntro strip - the old brand ctx machinery relocated); (2) 'can't get cutoff like library tab does' -> the strip is full-width and never truncates; (3) 'make setlist header sticky/static, just scroll the songs like library' -> the setlist mirrors the Library scroll model (head static, #setBody the only scroller) and drops the redundant h2. The offline-toast value-copy is pinned in test/sw-verify.test.js. Written red-first against the pre-fix tree.

steps.label: the intro strip is FULL-WIDTH chrome (its own line under the appbar, not squeezed in the brand column) and cannot truncate
Library first load: the intro states purpose + next step (tap to play, + saves to setlist)
the Setlist intro follows the same grammar (purpose + the Start next step) - no tab is the odd one out
the redundant h2 is gone and the head row is STATIC chrome: #setBody is the scroll container (Library model), not the page
Compose gets the same treatment (try chords -> grow into a song)
Tune names the action AND keeps the tuning readout the old ctx line carried
